name: Pasta Quiche
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces vermicelli or very thin spaghetti
Chopped vegetables as desired (broccoli, mushrooms, asparagus)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package instructions and place it in a deep ten-inch glass pie dish with melted butter.
2. Spread the pasta over the bottom of the dish and up the sides to form a thick "crust."
3. Sprinkle grated cheeses and chopped vegetables (if desired) into the crust.
4. Beat the remaining ingredients until well blended and pour over everything in the dish.
5. Press down and lift the pasta on the sides of the dish to form a crust.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean and the crust is golden brown.
